chapter_title.en: Chapter on What Necessitates Discretionary Punishment, Legal Punishment, Stoning, Execution, and Exile in Adultery

text: 4998 - وَ رَوَى هِشَامُ بْنُ سَالِمٍ عَنْ سُلَيْمَانَ بْنِ خَالِدٍ قَالَ: قُلْتُ لِأَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ فِي اَلْقُرْآنِ رَجْمٌ قَالَ "نَعَمْ" قُلْتُ كَيْفَ قَالَ " اَلشَّيْخُ وَ اَلشَّيْخَةُ فَارْجُمُوهُمَا اَلْبَتَّةَ فَإِنَّهُمَا قَضَيَا اَلشَّهْوَةَ ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.4998 - Hisham ibn Salim narrated from Sulayman ibn Khalid who said:
I asked Abu Abdullah (as) about the stoning mentioned in the Quran.
Imam (as) replied: "Yes."
I asked: "How is it mentioned?"
Imam (as) said: "The old man and the old woman - stone them absolutely, for they have fulfilled their desire."
